title: Inside Genebench-Pro
summary: Genebench-Pro是OpenAI推出的一个基准测试平台，用于评估AI模型在基因相关任务上的表现，包括基因功能预测、变异解读等。该页面通过案例研究展示了平台的设计、评估方法和实际应用效果。
highlights: Genebench-Pro is a benchmark for evaluating AI models on gene-related tasks.
The platform includes case studies demonstrating its design and evaluation methods.
It focuses on tasks like gene function prediction and variant interpretation.
